data.body: Second review BLOCK remediation: accepted f502632be5bbe2064/fa387e521751190d4 by adding a measurable advanced-doc AC and docs test. Accepted f04b77e5bbf376c71 by naming manifest.validate_review_phase_metadata plus sidecar.parse_review_phase_metadata and their exact errors. Accepted f5f565f059103b643 by defining lowercase string/JSON number/omitted-key v2 serialization and every null/type/combination failure. Accepted workflow advisories by threading review_phase through precheck output, gate YAML, decide input, and the execution_review closure, plus a production execution-floor integration. Corrected 75de prerequisite wording, split exact rollback preservation from documented precision loss, explained signed-vs-compiled phase roles, and fixed all retries to the immutable pre-LLM baseline. Rerunning before downstream review.
